ddls:
CREATE TABLE "monitoring_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the monitoring station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "maintenance_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monitoring station where the sensor is installed */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., PM2.5, PM10, NO2) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "calibration_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of calibration */,
  "sensor_status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES monitoring_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that took the reading */,
  "reading_date" TEXT /* Date the reading was taken */,
  "time_of_reading" TEXT /* Time the reading was taken */,
  "reading_value" REAL /* Value of the reading */,
  "reading_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the reading */,
  "sensor_status_at_reading" TEXT /* Status of the sensor at the time of the reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather reading */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station */,
  "weather_date" TEXT /* Date the weather reading was taken */,
  "time_of_reading" TEXT /* Time the weather reading was taken */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature reading */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity reading */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed reading */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the wind */,
  "atmospheric_pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure reading */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Amount of precipitation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "air_quality_indexes" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each air quality index */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monitoring station */,
  "index_date" TEXT /* Date the air quality index was calculated */,
  "time_of_calculation" TEXT /* Time the air quality index was calculated */,
  "aqi_value" REAL /* Value of the air quality index */,
  "aqi_category" TEXT /* Category of the air quality index */,
  "aqi_description" TEXT /* Description of the air quality index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_indexes_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES monitoring_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standard */,
  "pollutant" TEXT /* Name of the pollutant (e.g., PM2.5, PM10, NO2) */,
  "standard_value" REAL /* Value of the standard */,
  "standard_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the standard */,
  "standard_description" TEXT /* Description of the standard */,
  "standard_level" TEXT /* Level of the standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monitoring station */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the standard */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of compliance (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "compliance_date" TEXT /* Date the compliance was last checked */,
  "compliance_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments regarding the compliance status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES standards ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES monitoring_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, public) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monitoring station */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Time the notification was sent */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS, push notification) */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES monitoring_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., linear regression, decision tree) */,
  "training_data" TEXT /* Training data used to train the model */,
  "model_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "model_created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model making the prediction */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monitoring station */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date the prediction was made */,
  "prediction_time" TEXT /* Time the prediction was made */,
  "predicted_aqi" REAL /* Predicted air quality index */,
  "prediction_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "prediction_method" TEXT /* Method used for prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES monitoring_stations ("station_id")
)
